title: Cinematic Realism
description: Cinematic and realistic Modpack. Like those graphics you see on YouTube! Nice UI and survival experience!
body:
# **Cinematic Realism**

Cinematic Realism is a visual-focused Fabric modpack built for realistic graphics, shader support, and stable performance.
It is designed for players who want high-quality visuals while keeping full control over their settings.


### **Features**

Improved and cinematic world generation

Realistic Effects (camera, particles, etc.)

Shader-ready (Iris compatible)

Support for high-resolution resource packs

Distant Horizons support

Client-side performance optimizations

Vanilla-like gameplay

### **Resource Packs**

Resource packs like [Angel's Weather](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/angels-weather) and other "basic" resource packs are included. I strongly recommend to download the Patrix Resource Pack in any resolution! [Patrix x32](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/patrix-32x) | [Patrix x64 - x256](https://www.patreon.com/c/patrix/posts?vanity=patrix) 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

For Patrix x128 a capeable GPU is recommended (e.g. NVIDIA: RTX 4060, AMD: RX 9060 or above)

For Patrix x256 a beefy GPU is required (e.g. NVIDIA: RTX 5070 TI, AMD: RX 9070 XT or above)

</details>


### **Notes**

Shaders and high-res resource packs are optional but recommended

All in the Modpack and the Modpack Modrinth page photos were taken with Patrix x128, x256 and Photon Shaders.
